title: Joseli Pincinato | Director of Operations | Colombo & Hurd
content:
## Director of Legal Operations
Request A Consultation
Joseli Pincinato is the Director of Legal Operations at Colombo & Hurd, where she leads the firm’s legal operations with a focus on efficiency, compliance, and client care. With over two decades of experience in immigration law, and as an immigrant herself, Ms. Pincinato brings a rare combination of expertise, empathy, and dedication to every case.
Originally from Brazil, Ms. Pincinato moved to the United States in 2003 and began her career in immigration law with a passion for helping others navigate the same path she once walked. Since joining Colombo & Hurd in 2011, she has helped shape the firm’s success, supporting hundreds of clients in business and investor immigration matters, including L, E, H, O, EB-1, and EB-5 visas, PERM labor certifications, and adjustment of status filings.
She has been instrumental in helping the firm achieve and maintain a 100% approval rate on over 700 EB-5 petitions — a career highlight that reflects her precision and commitment to results.
Ms. Pincinato is fully fluent in Portuguese and English and speaks conversational Spanish, making her an essential bridge for international clients, especially those from Brazil. She holds a degree in Portuguese and English from Faculdade de Ciências e Letras Padre Anchieta in São Paulo.
For Ms. Pincinato, immigration law is more than a profession — it’s personal. She believes in the power of persistence, the importance of trust, and the transformative impact of helping others build a new life in the U.S. Her story stands as proof that with the right support, the American dream is within reach.

## Knowledge & Experience
- Faculdade de Ciências e Letras Padre Anchieta, São Paulo, Brazil (Degree in Portuguese and English)
